## Meeting Purpose

[Review and finalize the content strategy to unblock the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content strategy approved with two new clusters:** "Field Intelligence & AI" (outcome-first) and "Industrial Construction" (greenfield opportunity).](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [**Calibration article shifted to a trade-specific topic** (e.g., plumbing software) to better test the AI's ability to produce nuanced, mid-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Content OS build is unblocked:** GrowthX will start with approved clusters while Fieldwire circulates the full strategy for internal review.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [**AI analytics setup begins next week:** Fieldwire will provide custom prompts for the Check That platform to track brand visibility in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Review

  - [**Cluster 1 (Plans & Drawings):**](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [**Concern:** The cluster separates "Plans" and "Tasks," which are tightly linked in the product.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [**Resolution:** The AI content pipeline will be instructed to integrate "Plans" and "Tasks" where relevant, avoiding a structural change.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**Cluster 2 (Trade-Specific "Fan-Out"):**](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Create hyper-specific content using the `[Feature] + [Trade]` format (e.g., "job management software for electrical contractors").](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Captures long-tail search volume and provides tailored content for specific trades.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**New Cluster 5 (Field Intelligence & AI):**](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [**Strategy:** An outcome-first approach → focus on efficiency/productivity, then introduce AI as the enabler.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [**Content Mix:** Balance outcome-focused articles with foundational pillar pieces on "AI in construction."](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [**Action:** Coordinate with Fieldwire's internal team to avoid content duplication.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [**New Cluster 6 (Industrial Construction):**](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** A greenfield area with high search volume and low keyword difficulty (e.g., "data center construction" has 3k searches/mo, KD 8).](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Concern:** Search intent is unclear (e.g., looking for a software solution vs. a construction company).](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [**Decision:** Proceed with testing. The cluster will be a mix of branding (1/3) and commercial (2/3) content, with articles prioritized after core clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Calibration Article Shift

  - [**Initial Plan:** A generic, top-of-funnel article ("What is construction management software?").](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**New Plan:** A specific, mid-to-bottom-funnel article (e.g., "plumbing contractor software that works in the field").](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Provides a more effective test of the AI's ability to produce nuanced, trade-specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### AI Analytics Setup

  - [**Platform:** Check That, for tracking brand citations and sentiment in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Setup next week; requires \~1 week to populate data, providing a full 8-week view by the end of Phase 1.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
  - [**Input:** Fieldwire will provide a CSV of custom prompts (e.g., "best plumbing construction management software").](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
      - [Deliver the initial calibration article and Content OS draft by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [Produce the new trade-specific calibration article (e.g., plumbing software).](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
      - [Instruct the AI pipeline to integrate "Plans" and "Tasks" where relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
      - [Set up Check That analytics next week using Fieldwire's prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [**Fieldwire:**](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
      - [Review the Content OS draft and identify 1–2 clusters for immediate production.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
      - [Circulate the full content strategy internally for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
      - [Provide a CSV of custom prompts for the Check That platform.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
      - [Send final feedback on the product matrix artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/yVz8B3NhEkERPqNwpffPLNyLENo7zVsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
